_info: Written by louwok.com/admin. index.html reads this at runtime.

menu.name: Plain Fried Rice
menu.desc:
Egg, bean sprouts & green onion wok-tossed with seasoned rice. The St. Louis classic.
Straight outta the STL rice house playbook.

menu.name: Chicken Fried Rice
menu.desc:
All-white chicken wok-fired with rice, egg, bean sprouts, soy & green onion.
No-frills, all flavor — Midwest to the Valley.

menu.name: Beef Fried Rice
menu.desc:
Sliced beef wok-fired with rice, egg, bean sprouts & green onion in savory soy.
Bold, savory, and built for seconds.

menu.name: Shrimp Fried Rice
menu.desc:
Plump shrimp wok-fired with rice, egg, green onion & our house seasoning.
Ocean meets wok fire.

menu.name: Crab Rangoon
menu.desc:
Crispy wontons filled with sweet, creamy crab. Choose 4 or 8 pieces.
The takeout box MVP.

menu.name: St. Paul Sandwich (Chicken)
menu.desc:
Egg foo young patty, seasoned chicken, lettuce, tomato, onion, pickles & mayo on soft white bread.
The sandwich that put STL takeout on the map.

menu.name: Pineapple Chicken Fried Rice
menu.desc:
Chicken, sweet pineapple & wok-fired rice — sweet meets savory.
A tropical twist, wok-fired Lou Wok style.

menu.name: Ultimate Fried Rice
menu.desc:
Egg, chicken, shrimp, beef & veggies wok-fired together. Our biggest rice.
Everything, all at once, all wok-fired.

menu.name: Fried Chicken
menu.desc:
Crispy, seasoned fried chicken, golden & hot. 8 pieces.
Golden, crispy, gone in minutes.

menu.name: Vess Soda
menu.desc:
Ice-cold St. Louis original soda.
The soda every STL rice house pours.

menu.name: St. Paul Sandwich (Veggie)
menu.desc:
Egg foo young patty, lettuce, tomato, onion, pickles & mayo on soft white bread.
All the classic, none of the meat.

menu.name: St. Paul Sandwich (Deluxe)
menu.desc:
Egg foo young patty with any two proteins — chicken, shrimp, or beef — plus classic fixings.
Build it your way, STL style.

menu.name: Mystic Carrot Juice
menu.desc:
Bright, sweet carrot & fruit juice blend, served ice-cold.
A sweet, refreshing wildcard.

menu.name: Bottled Water
menu.desc:
16.9 fl oz, ice-cold.
Simple. Cold. Necessary.

menu.name: Lou Wok Box Combo
menu.desc:
Fried rice, an Original St. Paul Sandwich, 4 fried chicken, 4 crab rangoons & your choice of soda or juice.
The whole rice house experience in one box.

menu.name: Egg Roll (Veggie)
menu.desc:
Cabbage, carrot & veggies in a crispy fried shell. 2 pieces.
Light, crispy, and gone fast.

menu.name: Funnel Cake
menu.desc:
Crispy fried batter dusted with powdered sugar.
Our one fairground indulgence — because why not.

seo.title: Lou Wok Rice House | St. Louis Style Chinese Fried Rice & St. Paul Sandwiches in Phoenix, AZ
seo.description: Lou Wok Rice House brings authentic St. Louis-style fried rice to Phoenix, inspired by the legendary Chinese takeout flavors of St. Louis. Enjoy wok-fired chicken, beef, shrimp, and vegetable fried rice, crispy fried chicken, and iconic St. Paul sandwiches.
seo.keywords: St. Louis Style Fried Rice, Chinese Fried Rice, Chicken Fried Rice, Shrimp Fried Rice, Combo Fried Rice, Wok Fried Rice, Best Fried Rice Phoenix, St. Louis Chinese Food, St. Paul Sandwich, Chinese Food Phoenix, Chinese Food Truck, Original St. Louis, Chinamen, Laveen Chinese Food, Chandler Chinese Food, Avondale Chinese Food, Mesa Chinese Food, Tempe Chinese Food, Scottsdale Chinese Food, Glendale Chinese Food, Fried Chicken and Fried Rice, Rice House Style Fried Rice, Authentic Fried Rice, Takeout Fried Rice, Loaded Fried Rice, Phoenix Food Truck, Lou Wok Rice House, Original St. Louis Fried Rice

featured.label: Featured Item
featured.title:
THE ST. PAUL
SANDWICH
featured.desc: Born in St. Louis, Perfected at Lou Wok.

details.label: The Original St. Paul Sandwich. Built Different.

hero.sub: Fired over high heat. Built on flavor. Lou Wok serves up wok-tossed rice, fried chicken, crab rangoon, egg rolls and the legendary St. Paul sandwich — every plate made to order, every time.
